1.q: transgenic lemon displayed lower Na+ and higher proline concentrations, whereas the silenced line accumulated more Na+ but less proline.

3.q: This well-established pathway is composed of three interlinked components, SOS1, SOS2 and SOS3, that function together to avoid excessive accumulation of Na+ in the cytosol.

4.q: Homolog genes of SOS2 and P5CS1 were dramatically up-regulated in transgenic lemon but down-regulated in VIGS line.

5.q: Homolog genes of SOS2 and P5CS1 were dramatically up-regulated in transgenic lemon but down-regulated in VIGS line.

6.q: FcWRKY40 specifically binds to and activates promoters of FcSOS2 and FcP5CS1.

7.q: FcWRKY40 specifically binds to and activates promoters of FcSOS2 and FcP5CS1.

8.q: FcWRKY40 was up-regulated by ABA and salt, and confirmed as a target of ABA-responsive element binding factor 2 (FcABF2).

9.q: proline biosynthetic enzymes, such as D-1-pyrroline-5-carboxylate synthetase (P5CS) ... and their encoding genes.
